name: Yi-1.5 9B
note: Popular mid-size Yi-1.5 variant, continually pretrained on 3.6T tokens; top performer among similarly sized open models at launch.

results.notes: Yi-1.5-9B-Chat variant, via TIGER-Lab MMLU-Pro leaderboard evaluation [score corrected during round-5 full-corpus accuracy re-verify: 45.95 -> 39.16]

verificationNotes: Existence and release date (2024-05-13) confirmed on GitHub README ('Yi-1.5 series models are open-sourced'). Apache 2.0 license, 9B params, base-variant 4K context (vs the separate -16K/-32K suffixed checkpoints), and 3.6T-token continual pretraining confirmed on HF model card. The single result row is explicitly for the -Chat variant per its own notes field; fetched the cited HF page (01-ai/Yi-1.5-9B-Chat) and confirmed the MMLU-Pro 45.95 score literally appears there — no changes.
